content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative self-improvement pipeline as a foundation to ground unintegrated multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that tests inconsistent solution perspectives across iterations instead of only refining a single initial output. This framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data, while addressing the limitation of single-output self-refinement getting stuck in local optimal errors.
